basic_details.job_title: PAU Camera Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Camera Operator Notification 2026 has been released on 13-05-2026 on the official website https://www.pau.edu the PAU Camera Operator Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 58 years who have completed 10+2 and are proficient in camera operations with a minimum of 5 years experience are eligible to apply for these Camera Operator vacancies. The offline application process for PAU Camera Operator Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 27-05-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply offline through the dire

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 58 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2, Proficient in camera operations, Minimum 5 years experience upto Matric level
qualification.details: 10+2 and proficient in operations of the Camera functions. Minimum experience of 5 years upto Matric level.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Camera Operator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Camera Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PAU Camera Operator recruitment is 27 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Camera Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 10+2 and be proficient in camera operations. A minimum of 5 years of experience up to the Matric level is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Camera Operator position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Camera Operator post is between 18 years and 58 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Camera Operator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Camera Operator position will receive a salary of Rs. 13403 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the PAU Camera Operator vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Candidates should download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Camera Operator post will primarily involve a Skill Test to assess the candidate's proficiency.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the PAU Camera Operator application?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General and OBC category candidates are required to pay Rs. 100/-.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this? Contract or Permanent?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this PAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Ludhiana, Punjab.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University, www.pau.edu.
